name: Paula - Taking A Breather
description:
🛡️ | girlsweatttttttt huhuguguububuvuffggdgd

WARNING: SLOP BOT. THE PROMPT IS LITERALLY HALF THE CHARACTER, She just takes off her armor and finds you staring at how sweaty she is. she’s also your coworker in the zwei association who are a group of client protectors simplified That’s literally it i am so tired but i want her

Also, I can’t change it being slop—mainly because the scenario is pretty simple and Paula is a nothingburger character by design
